summary: The Black Skull Guild debates how to handle Alley Boss, who has been deleting characters, prompting New World Guild's Acting Captain Kang Jung-Gu to demand a dignified duel against him. Meanwhile, Alley Boss, revealed to be the legendary "Meleegod," secures a lucrative streaming contract with Nike, which includes monthly unique-grade items. After intense training, Alley Boss, now Level 40, arrives at the Yusma Colosseum for the duel. Against expectations of a one-on-one, he prepares to face the entire Black Skull Guild in a 1-on-13 "Team Battle" with character deletion on the line.
key_moments: The Black Skull Guild discusses Alley Boss's risky character deletion bets and reputation, leading Acting Captain Kang Jung-Gu to order a dignified duel.
Alley Boss (as Meleegod) signs a lucrative two-year streaming contract with Nike, which promises significant pay, bonuses, and monthly unique-grade items.
Alley Boss engages in intense, 30-hour training sessions, leveling up six times to reach Level 40 in preparation for the duel.
The duel begins at Yusma Colosseum, where Alley Boss, despite expectations, faces the Black Skull Guild in a 1-on-13 "Team Battle" with winner-takes-all and character deletion stakes.
